title: Banisteriopsis pubipetala
taxonomy: Banisteriopsis pubipetala is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is native to South America, and its classification places it within the genus Banisteriopsis, which is part of the Malpighiales order. The Malpighiaceae family consists of over 1,600 species, many of which are native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. Banisteriopsis pubipetala's classification also places it within the Rubiidaeae clade, which is a group of flowering plants that are characterized by having five-merous flowers. The plant's classification is an important tool for understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other species.
